items.summary: Expose a backend function that allows a privileged principal (e.g., the canister deployer / initial caller) to grant admin role to a specified principal, and add a one-time self-promotion path so the current authenticated user can be set as admin when no admin exists yet.

Add an 'Admin Setup' button or flow in the Admin page (or a standalone setup route) that allows an authenticated user to claim admin rights when no admin has been assigned yet. The button should call the backend promotion function and refresh the admin-check query on success.
